overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a dense orange dust storm in a futuristic commercial district. The scene features heavy atmospheric haze obscuring visibility, illuminated digital billboards lining the sidewalk, and the character navigating past pedestrians to cross a multi-lane intersection.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated billboards and scattered pedestrians in the dust storm

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements
large vertical screen displaying 'NICOLA' text in red
screen showing '3 MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' text with purple graphics
tall tree with sparse foliage visible through the orange haze
metal barrier separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road
curved modern street light pole along the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk during a heavy dust storm, with digital billboards glowing through the orange haze on the left and a metal guard rail separating the walkway from the empty road on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete path.

events.description: passing a group of pedestrians standing near the bus stop shelter

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various advertisements including All Foods and Cirrus Cola signs, approaching the intersection

entered.detail: screen displaying '2nd AMENDMENT IS NOT ONLY FOR THE RICH' in yellow text
yellow billboard with 'ALL FOODS' text and clown mascot
blue and red billboard for 'CIRRUS COLA' with star logo
covered waiting area with bench and overhead protection

segments.scene_description: The character progresses along the sidewalk past a series of colorful digital advertisements including All Foods and Cirrus Cola billboards. The commercial building facade recedes into the distance as the character approaches a bus stop shelter and the intersection ahead, with street trees now visible further down the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection crosswalk during dust storm

events.description: character reaches the crosswalk at the intersection, transitioning from sidewalk to street crossing
pickup truck drives through the intersection as character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk edge then crossing the multi-lane street with a group of pedestrians, navigating through low visibility

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving across the intersection through the dust storm

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
open area where multiple roads meet, barely visible through the dust
tall skyscrapers looming in the distance obscured by orange haze
tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a wide intersection and joins a group of pedestrians crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. A pickup truck drives through the intersection as the character navigates the open space, with distant tower buildings barely visible through the dense orange dust. The commercial structures of the previous segments fall away behind as the crossing continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a commercial sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, hazy city intersection. It begins with the character navigating a concrete path during a heavy dust storm, where glowing digital billboards pierce through a dense orange haze beside a metal guard rail. As the character progresses, the camera passes a series of colorful advertisements for All Foods and Cirrus Cola, moving past a bus stop shelter as the building facades recede. The scene then expands as the character reaches a wide intersection, joining a group of pedestrians to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk while a pickup truck drives past. Finally, the commercial structures fall away behind the character, leaving only the silhouettes of distant tower buildings barely visible through the thick atmospheric dust.
